import json, pathlib, re, unicodedata, difflib, math, statistics
import json, codecs, os, glob, pprint, sys, collections

qpath="/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hpath="/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)
len(qdata), type(qdata)

# function to normalize
import re, unicodedata
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
def normalize_ar(s):
    s = s.replace('ـ','') # tatweel
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]+',' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    # unify alef forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ٱ','ا')
    return s
target = "فَأَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ مِنَ الْأَرْضِ حِمْلَهُمْ وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ مَطَرًا فَأَنْبَتْنَا لَهُمْ مِنَ الْأَرْضِ حَصِيدًا"
norm_target = normalize_ar(target)
norm_target

# search for substring in normalized ayah_texts
matches=[]
for rec in qdata:
    norm = normalize_ar(rec['ayah_text'])
    if norm_target in norm or norm in norm_target or difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, norm, norm_target).ratio()>0.6 and any(tok in norm for tok in norm_target.split()[:3]):
        matches.append((rec, difflib.SequenceMatcher(None, norm, norm_target).ratio()))
len(matches)

# show top matches by ratio
matches_sorted = sorted(matches, key=lambda x: -x[1])
for rec, score in matches_sorted[:20]:
    print(score, rec['surah_name'], rec['ayah_id'], rec['ayah_text'])

tokens = set(norm_target.split())
cands=[]
for rec in qdata:
    norm = normalize_ar(rec['ayah_text'])
    inter = tokens.intersection(set(norm.split()))
    if len(inter)>=2 and any(t in norm for t in ['امطرنا','فانبتنا','حصيدا','فاخرجنا']):
        cands.append((rec, inter))
len(cands)

for rec, inter in cands[:50]:
    print(rec['surah_name'], rec['ayah_id'], rec['ayah_text'], "||", inter)
